title: croton microphyllinus
intro: Croton microphyllinus, also known as the small-leaved croton, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, native to tropical Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Croton microphyllinus include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
